blocked_sleeves: Mean Reversion if recent drawdown stress is absent
regimes.definition: SPY > 60d SMA and IWM > 60d SMA; 20d realized vol <= 60d median vol
regimes.label: TREND_UP_LOW_VOL

regimes.definition: SPY > 60d SMA and IWM > 60d SMA; 20d realized vol > 60d median vol
regimes.label: TREND_UP_HIGH_VOL

regimes.definition: SPY and IWM within +/-3% of 60d SMA; 20d realized vol <= 60d median vol
regimes.label: RANGE_LOW_VOL

allowed_sleeves: Mean Reversion only after panic-extension confirmation
regimes.definition: SPY and IWM within +/-3% of 60d SMA; 20d realized vol > 60d median vol
regimes.label: RANGE_HIGH_VOL

blocked_sleeves: Mean Reversion unless separate capitulation gate exists
regimes.definition: SPY or IWM drawdown from 60d high <= -8%
regimes.label: DRAWDOWN_STRESS

regimes.definition: After DRAWDOWN_STRESS, SPY and IWM close above 10d SMA for 3 sessions
regimes.label: RECOVERY_BOUNCE

regimes.definition: IWM under 60d SMA and SPY under 60d SMA
regimes.label: RISK_OFF
